text: Being here, I feel a sense of quiet curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and soft lighting of the meeting room make me aware of boundaries—between inside and outside, participant and observer. Moving into the vibrant exhibition space, the bold R+D and interactive displays spark my thoughts about innovation, collaboration, and the unknown potential in collective inquiry. I am reminded of the act of learning as both an individual and communal journey, and I feel quietly inspired to explore and reflect on what it means to connect, share, and advance knowledge together.
